content: Ms Woodcock: Your man MJR certainly knows how to handle his weapons... both kinds. Saw him put down three Camden raiders earlier without breaking a sweat. That big fucking handgun of his makes me wet just thinking about it – shame he doesn't share. Archie: Don't even fucking think about it, Woodcock. MJR's mine and I'll gut any slag who tries to take him. Those raider bitches from the 5th Column keep trying to ambush us—wanna turn him into their personal fucktoy. Not while I'm breathing. Ms Woodcock: Oh darling, I wouldn't dream of poaching. Though I do wonder why a proper Gentry supporter like yourself hasn't convinced him to join our cause. We could protect him from those fascist cunts. Archie: MJR's got his own business in this shithole. But Christ, seeing him blow open a raider's chest gets my pussy dripping every time. The way he cocks that pistol one-handed while fisting my arse with the other... makes me want to bend over right here. Ms Woodcock: Such... traditional tastes.

Ms Woodcock: Tradition has its charms, darling, but this city runs on more... flexible arrangements. You should visit the Gentry halls someday—see how proper power and pleasure intertwine. Archie: Fuck your halls and your pretty words. MJR and I move our own way. Now if you'll excuse me, I think I hear him loading his pistol—means it's time to reload .
